products.name: Vintage '98 Leather Biker Jacket
products.description: An authentic slice of late 90s rebellion. This asymmetrical biker jacket features thick, buttery cowhide that has aged to perfection. Asymmetrical zip closure with three external zip pockets.

products.name: Distressed Leather Bomber
products.description: Classic bomber silhouette in weathered brown leather. Ribbed cuffs and hem with vintage brass hardware. Interior fully lined.

products.name: 90s Faded Denim Jacket
products.description: Perfectly worn-in denim jacket with natural fading. Oversized fit with button closure. Two chest pockets and two side pockets.

products.name: Original 1994 Tour Tee
products.description: Authentic concert merchandise from the 1994 world tour. Heavyweight cotton with original screen print intact. Minor cracking adds character.

products.name: Hand-knit Wool Cardigan
products.description: Artisan hand-knitted cardigan in cream wool. Cable knit pattern throughout. Pearl button closure. Warm and cozy for layering.

products.name: Military Surplus Cargos
products.description: Genuine military surplus cargo pants. Multiple pocket design with drawstring ankle. Durable ripstop fabric in olive green.

products.name: Classic Oxford Shirt
products.description: Timeless button-down oxford in crisp white. Medium weight cotton with chest pocket. Perfect for layering or wearing alone.

products.name: Horsebit Leather Loafers
products.description: Italian-made leather loafers with signature horsebit detail. Leather sole with light patina. Timeless style that works with everything.

products.name: Tortoiseshell Frames
products.description: Vintage acetate sunglasses in classic tortoiseshell pattern. UV protection lenses. Comes with original leather case.

products.name: Aran Wool Sweater
products.description: Traditional Irish Aran sweater in natural cream wool. Intricate cable and diamond patterns. Medium weight, perfect for fall.

products.name: Prada Nylon Mini Bag
products.description: Iconic Prada nylon mini bag in black. Silver-tone hardware with zip closure. Includes authenticity card and dust bag.

products.name: Nike Air Max 90 Vintage
products.description: Retro Nike Air Max 90 in grey and hot pink colorway. Visible Air unit. Minor sole wear, uppers in excellent condition.

products.name: Adidas Vintage Tracktop
products.description: Classic Adidas track jacket in navy with three-stripe detail. Full zip with stand collar. Original label intact.

products.name: Levi's 501 Selvedge Jeans
products.description: Premium selvedge denim Levi's 501. Natural indigo fading with whisker details. Button fly. Made in USA.

products.name: Cashmere Turtleneck
products.description: Luxurious 100% cashmere turtleneck in charcoal grey. Incredibly soft with fine gauge knit. Minimal pilling.

products.name: Canvas Tote Bag
products.description: Heavy-duty canvas tote with leather handles. Interior zip pocket. Perfect everyday carry with natural patina developing over time.
